name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
When your mind and your body don't think alike

"Now that's the face I wanted to see."

.

♡❀˖⁺. ༶ ⋆˙⊹❀♡

.

I did it! I finally gave you the enemies to lovers you wanted (or I hope I did). Thank you to the person who gave me that idea! It was fun to write, never did something like that before.

.

Some sexual tension between heros who despise eachother? Hmmm, that can lead to only one thing now, can it?

.

♡❀˖⁺. ༶ ⋆˙⊹❀♡

.

Have fun! 𓂃˚ ᡣ𐭩˙ᵕ˙ᰔᩚ ˚𓂃
